title: TLRY Earnings: Highlights of Tilray's Q1 2023 Financial Results
text: Tilray Brands posted Q1 2023 revenues of $176.95 million for the quarter ended August 2023, compared to year-ago revenues of $153.21 million. The company reported quarterly loss of $0.10 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.05. In an earlier Q1 2023 report, the company had reported a wider net loss with revenues declining 9% to $153.2 million. The quarter demonstrated the company's challenges in meeting market expectations while continuing to expand its operations internationally.
